name: libipc-system-simple-perl
title: libipc-system-simple-perl
summary: Perl module to run commands simply, with detailed diagnostics
description:
Perl module to run commands simply, with detailed diagnostics
IPC::System::Simple takes the hard work out of calling external commands; it
provides replacements for system() and the backtick operator that will either
succeed, or die with rich diagnostic messages on errors.
.
The module also includes the ability to specify acceptable exit values, trap
errors, or process diagnostics.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libipc-system-simple-perl because Perl module to run commands simply, with detailed diagnostics.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libipc-system-simple-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libipc-system-simple-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libipc-system-simple-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
